positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for affection_love_positive_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    positive(sK1)).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    affection(sK0)).

cnf(u15,negated_conjecture,
    ~affection(sK1)).

cnf(u14,negated_conjecture,
    ~positive(X0) | ~affection(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define love(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
